SEARCH
Package io.papermc.paper.scoreboard.numbers

Interface StyledFormat

All Superinterfaces:
ComponentBuilderApplicable, NumberFormat, StyleBuilderApplicable
@NullMarked public interface StyledFormat extends NumberFormat, StyleBuilderApplicable
A scoreboard number format that applies a custom formatting to the score number.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Style
    style()
    The style that is being applied to the number in the score
